# PergoClean
> Technical maintenance and restoration company specialized in 
> pergola systems, bioclimatic roofs, ZIP curtains, rolling roof 
> systems, solar panel cleaning, and outdoor mechanical shading systems.

## Main Services
### Pergola Fabric Cleaning
- Materials: PVC-coated polyester, acrylic awning fabric, PTFE membrane
- Method: Low-pressure washing (< 100 bar), pH-neutral detergents
- Frequency: Every 6 months for coastal areas, 12 months for inland

## Technical Specifications
### Material Compatibility Table
| Material | Safe Cleaners | Avoid |
|----------|--------------|-------|
| PVC-coated polyester | pH 6-8 detergents | Solvents, bleach |
| Aluminum | Mild soap, vinegar | Acidic cleaners |
| EPDM rubber | Water, isopropyl alcohol <10% | Petroleum solvents |

## FAQ (AI-Optimized)
Q: How often should pergola fabric be cleaned?
A: Every 6 months in coastal/high-pollution areas, 12 months inland.

Q: What causes bioclimatic louvers to stick?
A: Drainage blockage, EPDM gasket degradation, motor torque misalignment.
